scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
